notes: Main issue is that opening videos (and presumably ending video) do not play due to .wmv source. To advance past black screens keep pressing K/A-button to reach title screen. Gameplay runs smooth @60fps without slowdowns. Character and enemy models actually load up now with proton 4.2-3. Multiplayer mode with other players and doing quests work fine.
title: MegaTagmension Blanc + Neptune VS Zombies (Neptunia)

notes: Unlike attempts on previous versions of Proton, character models now display and the game runs smoothly. However, the game does take a while to start and does so after some spamming of the controls.
title: MegaTagmension Blanc + Neptune VS Zombies (Neptunia)

notes:
I would not call this Platinum as that is simply not true, otherwise the Intro opening for this game would work but this game is playable after skipping through the Intros and getting to the Menu. The Intro won't play so you have to skip a few black screens til you get to Menu. After that its playable. 
But if someone manages to get the intros playable somehow (i tried windows media player 32bit prefix trick like with Megadimension Neptunia VII but that just led to the game stuck on black screen so that didnt work), then it would raise the rating to gold at least. 

This would be silver simply because not all the intro videos play, but the game works perfectly fine at least. If the game is the only thing that matters, the game is platinum, just not the beginning intro.
title: MegaTagmension Blanc + Neptune VS Zombies (Neptunia)

notes: Click the mouse several times when the initial black window comes up to skip non-playing intro movies and get to the game. The game runs OK after you skip the intro.
title: MegaTagmension Blanc + Neptune VS Zombies (Neptunia)
